caption: Your privacy is a right, not a premium add-on. Freedom DNS encrypts your traffic, helps you access content without unnecessary blocks, and adds real-time protection against phishing, malware, and malicious sites in the background. One tap gives you a safer calmer internet experience for work, travel, and everyday browsing. #privacy #onlinesafety #dns #cybersecurity #mobilesafety
title: Freedom DNS - Trust & Protection
